name: Jira
description:
Jira Integration

Query and manage Jira issues directly from Claude Code. Search with JQL, view issue details, update fields, transition status, assign issues, and look up users—all without leaving your terminal.

Capabilities:
- Search issues with full JQL support
- View and update issue fields (summary, priority, labels, assignee)
- Transition issues through workflow states
- Look up assignable users by project
- List projects and discover custom fields

Create a credentials file at ~/.jira/credentials (or ./.jira/credentials in your working directory):
   JIRA_URL=https://yourcompany.atlassian.net
   JIRA_EMAIL=you@example.com
   JIRA_API_KEY=your-api-token

Get your API token from: https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens

Credential resolution order:
   1. Environment variables (JIRA_URL, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_KEY) — highest priority
   2. ./.jira/credentials in your working directory
   3. ~/.jira/credentials in your home directory

Security note: The jira_api.js script handles credentials directly—Claude never sees or reads your API keys.

Don't worry if you get this wrong. The skill will detect auth issues and tell you exactly what's missing or misconfigured.
